happy.title: K-On!

happy.synopsis: A calligrapher moves to a remote village and finds inspiration and joy through its quirky inhabitants.

happy.synopsis: The hilarious and absurd daily lives of high school girls in a world full of unexpected comedy.

sad.synopsis: A piano prodigy rediscovers music and life after meeting a spirited violinist.

sad.synopsis: A group of childhood friends confront past grief after a ghost from their past appears.

angry.synopsis: A group of criminals carry out dangerous missions in a dark cyberpunk society.

angry.title: Dororo
angry.synopsis: A young man hunts demons who stole his body parts — with a child thief at his side.

chill.synopsis: A quiet wanderer explores supernatural phenomena in serene natural landscapes.
